results.rendered_html:
preyas a. (sī f.) Dearer, more beloved or agreeable &c. (comper. of priya q. v.).
— m.
1 A lover, husband.
2 A dear friend;  Māl. 10. 24. 
— m.
— n. Flattery.
— sī A wife, mistress.
